Class PlayerStatusController

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI.Controllers.PlayerStatusController
All Implemented Interfaces:
GUIObserver
public class PlayerStatusController extends Object implements GUIObserver
Controller for PlayerStatus.fxml.

Shows a leaderboard above a TabPane where each tab contains one player's card. Implements GUIObserver for live updates; registers on init and deregisters when the window closes.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PlayerStatusController()
    Creates a new PlayerStatusController (required by the FXML loader).

    Called when the player who must place their totem changes.

    Called when the active player (whose turn it is to draw/play) changes.

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayerStatusController

      public PlayerStatusController()
      Creates a new PlayerStatusController (required by the FXML loader).

  • Method Details

    • init

      public void init(ClientVirtualView clientHandler, PlayerDTO myPlayer)
      Provides the controller with the client handler and the local player's DTO. Must be called before the FXML initialize() lifecycle method runs.
      Parameters:
      clientHandler - the client view holding live game state.
      myPlayer - the DTO of the local player, used to highlight their own tab.

    • unregister

      public void unregister()
      Removes this controller from the list of GUI observers. Should be called when the player-status window is closed.

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      FXML lifecycle callback. Registers this controller as a GUI observer, builds the leaderboard, and populates one tab per player.

    • onCardAddedToTribe

      public void onCardAddedToTribe(String nickname, CardDTO card)
      Description copied from interface: GUIObserver
      Called when a card is added to a player's tribe.
      Specified by:
      onCardAddedToTribe in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player who received the card.
      card - the DTO of the card that was added.

    • onPlayerFoodChanged

      public void onPlayerFoodChanged(String nickname, int newFood)
      Description copied from interface: GUIObserver
      Called when a player's food supply changes.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerFoodChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player whose food changed.
      newFood - the new food total.

    • onPlayerPPChanged

      public void onPlayerPPChanged(String nickname, int newPP)
      Description copied from interface: GUIObserver
      Called when a player's prestige-point total changes.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerPPChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      nickname - the nickname of the player whose PP changed.
      newPP - the new prestige-point total.
